case_title: MAIACHI MAYNARD VS. THE UPS STORE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-01-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE UPS STORE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYNARD, MALACHI` RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE UPS STORE, INC. $1,369.11 PRINCIPAL, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,518.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
